summary: Excellent audience recording of an electrifying show featuring a smoking Jack Straw and a standout Branford Marsalis guest.
review: The tape captures a high‑energy performance where the band was “smokin’” from the first note, highlighted by a ripping Jack Straw and an inspired guest appearance by Branford. Reviewers rave about the crystal‑clear audience sound, calling it one of the best‑sounding sources for this legendary concert.

ai_rating.rationale: All three reviews are five‑star and uniformly praise both the musical performance and the audio fidelity, indicating an exceptional show with excellent recording quality.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewers describe the tape as “awesome,” “best sounding source,” and note it surpasses other audience copies; no issues mentioned, indicating clear, crisp capture of the live ambience.

show_quality.setlist_flow: The concert flows with high energy throughout; the band was on fire even before guest saxophonist Branford Marsalis joined, making for a consistently powerful set.
